ham.subject: Order Confirmation – Order #123456789
ham.body:
Dear John,

Thank you for your order with XYZ Store! Your purchase (Order #123456789) has been received and is now in processing. Your items will be shipped to 123 Main St, Springfield within 2–3 business days. Total amount: $79.99 (Tax included). Shipping is free.

Track your shipment here: <URL>

If you have any questions, please contact our support team at <URL>.

Best regards,
XYZ Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Invoice #INV-987654 – Pay Now to Avoid Cancellation
spam.body:
Dear John,

A recent transaction on your XYZ Store account has generated Invoice #INV-987654 that remains unpaid. Please review the details and remit the full amount of $79.99 within 24 hours to keep your order. If the payment is not received, the order will be automatically cancelled.

Verify payment instructions and submit your bank details securely: <URL>

This invoice is issued by our Account Manager, Ms. Sarah Thompson, and requires immediate action.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
XYZ Billing Department
